prose.en: A centralised event logging facility can be used to capture, protect and manage event logs from multiple sources in a coordinated manner. This may be achieved by using a Security Information and Event Management (SIEM) platform, a Security Orchestration, Automation and Response (SOAR) platform, or both. Furthermore, in support of a centralised event logging facility, it is important that an accurate and consistent time source is used to assist with identifying connections between events.
